title: Day 9/30 — backtesting humbled me again today 😭
author: Standard_Boot_8165
selftext:
Spent a few hours going through the latest results and honestly…

this bot still does some absolutely cursed things sometimes 💀

One trade looks clean.

Next trade enters like it saw a completely different chart.

That’s the part that’s messing with me right now.

Not the coding itself.

It’s trying to make the logic behave consistently across different market conditions without turning the whole system into a giant overcomplicated mess.

Today was mostly:

checking bad entries

replaying sessions

comparing clean vs messy setups

removing some overfiltered logic again

I’m also realizing I rely on “feel” way more than I thought when trading manually.

A bot doesn’t have intuition.

If the rule isn’t clearly defined…

it’ll just do nonsense confidently 😭

Still far from stable.

But weirdly I’m learning more from these failed backtests than from most of my manual trading days.
